channel.title: GitHub WebAssembly Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of WebAssembly in GitHub

item.title: WebAssembly/binaryen
item.description: Compiler infrastructure and toolchain library for WebAssembly

item.title: torch2424/wasmboy
item.description: Game Boy / Game Boy Color Emulator Library, 🎮written for WebAssembly using AssemblyScript. 🚀Demos built with Preact and Svelte. ⚛️

item.title: AssemblyScript/assemblyscript
item.description: Definitely not a TypeScript to WebAssembly compiler 🚀

item.title: WebAssembly/spec
item.description: WebAssembly specification, reference interpreter, and test suite.
